message:
fix(sona): Address all P0 critical issues from deep review

- Add TypeScript interfaces for SONA engine (remove 'any' types)
- Implement comprehensive input validation (embeddings, quality scores)
- Fix path traversal vulnerabilities in CLI commands
- Add proper resource cleanup (EventEmitter listeners, db connections)
- Improve error handling with null checks
- Add validation utilities for secure file operations

All critical security and quality issues from SONA_TRAINING_DEEP_REVIEW.md addressed.
